zh.lifeSummary: 當Baron Reiner de Waterton於1272年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾馬可特 迪平時，他的父親William de Waterton31歲，母親Dionysia33歲。他和Baroness Elizabeth至少有1個兒子。他去世於1310年在他的家鄉享年38歲。

variants.name: Deborah
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘bee’ in Hebrew), borne by the nurse of Rebecca (Genesis 35:8) and by a woman judge and prophet (Judges 4–5) who led the Israelites to victory over the Canaanites. It has always been popular as a Jewish name. It was in use among Christians by the mid 16th century and was taken up by the Puritans in the 17th century, in part because the bee was a symbol of industriousness. Since then it has enjoyed enormous popularity, peaking in the 1960s. Among other famous bearers is the actress  Deborah Kerr  (  1921–2007 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Baron Reiner de Waterton was born in 1272, in Market Deeping, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Waterton, was 31 and his mother, Dionysia, was 33. He had at least 1 son with Baroness Elizabeth. He died in 1310, in his hometown, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baron Reiner de Waterton est né en 1272, à Market Deeping, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Waterton, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Dionysia, avait 33 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Baroness Elizabeth. Il est décédé en 1310, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baron Reiner de Waterton 1272 in Market Deeping, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Waterton 31 und seine Mutter Dionysia 33. Er hatte mit Baroness Elizabeth mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1310 im Alter von 38 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Baroness Elizabeth. Morì nel 1310, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Baron Reiner de Watertonが1272年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアマーケト ディーパングで生まれた時，父William de Watertonは31歳，母Dionysiaは33歳であった。彼はBaroness Elizabethとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1310年に故郷で38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Baron Reiner de Waterton(이)가 1272년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 마크트 디핀그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Waterton(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Dionysia(은)는 33세였다. 그는 Baroness Elizabeth(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1310년 그의 고향에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baron Reiner de Waterton родился в 1272 г. в местности маркет дипинг, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Waterton было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Dionysia, 33. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Baroness Elizabeth. Он умер в 1310 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 38 лет.
